course_map_role.description: Full course map, including prerequisites, roadmap, and ALO specs.

user_profile_role.description: User identity, professional goals, and hardware constraints (Evolvable).

failure_ledger_role.description: Distilled ledger of past mistakes to avoid.

progress_ledger_role.description: Append-only ledger of mastered ALOs and proof of reasoning.

course_history_role.description: Raw history of all learning sessions.

closure_template_role.description: Operational blueprint for session closure and log generation.

session_initiation_role.description: Operational blueprint for session startup and agenda locking.

alo_verification_role.description: Deterministic protocol for mastery gating and evidence audit.

friction_telemetry_role.description: Structured schema for recording conceptual friction as telemetry.

alo_phase_role.description: Deterministic verification criteria for all phases (Authorized directory).

student_submission_role.description: Authorized directory for student code submissions and exercise artifacts.
